name: Arweave Uploader

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🎉 Initial Release: v1.0.0

I am excited to announce the first version of the Obsidian Arweave Uploader plugin! This plugin allows you to upload your Obsidian notes to the Arweave network, turning your notes into static web pages.

Check out the usage instructions in the [README](https://github.com/your_username/your_plugin/blob/main/README.md).

Thank you for using the plugin!
